3 = Partial Dual) 
4 = Full Dual 
0 = Not MMLEADS population for the month 
Null/missing = not enrolled in the month 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable using the MBSF monthly dual status code (note that these source 
variables are also included in MMLEADS as MDCR_DUAL_STUS_CD_01–12). If the beneficiary has more 
than one value during the month (i.e., due to being enrolled in Medicaid in more than one state during 
the month), then CCW uses the maximum value of the monthly
